description: Triggers for writing strong, impact-focused resume bullet points

queries.query: Rewrite these weak resume bullets with strong action verbs and impact
Write 5 resume bullets for my software engineering experience
My bullets are task-focused — help me make them outcome-focused
I have generic bullets like 'responsible for X' — rewrite them
Write compelling resume bullet points that will impress hiring managers
Turn these job responsibilities into achievement-focused bullets
Write bullets that highlight both technical depth and business impact
My bullets don't show leadership — help me rewrite them
Help me write 3-4 bullets per role that stand out to recruiters
Rewrite 'worked on the product' into a strong, specific resume bullet
Add metrics and percentages to my resume achievements
Organize my resume into proper sections with the right order
Fix the ATS keyword gaps in my resume
Format my resume for consistent visual appearance
Tailor my resume for this specific PM role at Stripe
Write a professional summary for my resume
Write an executive resume for a CFO role
Help me manage multiple resume versions
Optimize my LinkedIn profile for engineering roles
Write a cover letter for a product manager position
